name: Bug Report / تقرير خلل
about: Report a bug to help us improve ARKSpace
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Bug Description / وصف الخلل

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce / خطوات إعادة الإنتاج

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior / السلوك المتوقع

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior / السلوك الفعلي

What actually happened.

## Screenshots / لقطات الشاشة

If applicable, add screenshots.

## Environment / البيئة

- **Frappe Version:** v16.x.x
- **ERPNext Version:** v16.x.x
- **ARKSpace Version:** 6.0.0
- **Browser:** [e.g., Chrome 120]
- **OS:** [e.g., Ubuntu 22.04]
- **Language:** [Arabic / English]
- **RTL Mode:** [Yes / No]

## Console Errors / أخطاء وحدة التحكم

```
Paste any browser console errors here
```

## Server Logs / سجلات الخادم

```
Paste any relevant server logs here
```

## Additional Context / سياق إضافي

Add any other context about the problem here.
